description: You are a GIS specialist at a water resources engineering firm tasked with preparing the global rivers dataset for a Central European watershed connectivity analysis. The analysis requires metric distances (not geographic degrees), so the data must be in a projected coordinate system appropriate for Central Europe. Reproject the Natural Earth rivers layer located at /home/ga/gvsig_data/rivers/ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp from its native geographic coordinate system to UTM Zone 33N (EPSG:32633 — WGS 84 / UTM zone 33N). Save the reprojected layer as a new shapefile to /home/ga/gvsig_exports/rivers_utm33n.shp. The output file must use
